_publications._publicationTitle: The development of the PlexiQoL: A patient-reported outcome measure for adults with neurofibromatosis type 1-associated plexiform neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: Seven participants were removed from the analysis as they did not respond to the items in a logical manner, as would be expected to occur with all questionnaires. This can only be determined by the application of RMT.
details: Successfully identified 7 participants who did not respond logically to items, allowing for their removal from analysis
